name: Aioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until very thick and lemon colored.
2. Add the mashed garlic and salt to the beaten eggs.
3. Continuously beat in olive oil slowly, drop by drop, until about half the oil has been incorporated.
4. Stir in vinegar and lemon juice once the mixture begins to thicken.
5. Continue beating while adding the remaining olive oil slowly until a thick emulsion forms.
Aioli may be used as a garlicky alternative to mayonnaise, but is delicious on its own as a sauce or dip for seafood or vegetables.
